statement: In every magma, Equation 1190 (`x = y * ((z * (z * z)) * z)`) implies Equation 880 (`x = y * ((x * y) * (x * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0615
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op z z)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op x y) (op x y)))
